'''鈭歱-ng-v-p''' ('''kapangvepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:phlorizinize|phlorizinize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ng-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phlorizinize|phlorizinize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-ng-v-p
|-
! Lemma
| kapangvepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipangvepoko|thipangvepoko]] || [[word:jipangvepoko|jipangvepoko]] || [[word:shipangvepoko|shipangvepoko]] || [[word:kipangvepoko|kipangvepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupangvepoko|thuthupangvepoko]] || [[word:jujupangvepoko|jujupangvepoko]] || [[word:shushupangvepoko|shushupangvepoko]] || [[word:kukupangvepoko|kukupangvepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopangvepoko|thopangvepoko]] || [[word:jopangvepoko|jopangvepoko]] || [[word:shopangvepoko|shopangvepoko]] || [[word:kopangvepoko|kopangvepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pangvepoko|th忙pangvepoko]] || [[word:j忙pangvepoko|j忙pangvepoko]] || [[word:sh忙pangvepoko|sh忙pangvepoko]] || [[word:k忙pangvepoko|k忙pangvepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
